summary: Tested TasksPage and ReportsPage functionality. Fixed 422 error on task creation by updating TaskCreate model to accept assignee_name/project_name fields and frontend to properly format null values. All features working: task CRUD, status changes, exports (Excel/PDF/CSV).

issues: Minor: Missing Description/aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: TaskCreate model was rejecting extra fields (assignee_name, project_name) - added model_config = ConfigDict(extra='ignore') and explicit fields
Fixed: Frontend was sending empty string for due_date which caused datetime parsing error - now sends null for empty dates
Minor: DialogContent accessibility warning should be addressed by adding aria-describedby
seed_data_creation: Test tasks created via curl and UI during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: TasksPage and ReportsPage fully functional. Backend TaskCreate model accepts assignee_name and project_name fields. Export endpoints for tasks and reports all working.

TasksPage.loads_real_backend_data: PASS - Shows tasks from MongoDB via /api/tasks
TasksPage.add_task_button_opens_modal: PASS - Dialog with Create New Task opens
TasksPage.add_task_form_fields: PASS - Title, Description, Status, Priority, Assignee, Due Date, Project, Tags all present
TasksPage.save_task_persists_to_backend: PASS - Task created successfully, refreshes list
TasksPage.status_change_via_dropdown: PASS - Mark as To Do/In Progress/Completed/Blocked all work
TasksPage.date_filter: PASS - From/To date inputs present with Clear Filters button
TasksPage.export_dropdown_excel_pdf: PASS - Export to Excel and Export to PDF options visible and functional

ReportsPage.export_dropdown_excel_pdf_csv: PASS - Excel, PDF, CSV options all present
